title: Enterprise Value: If a company has an equity value of 200 million,...
summary: Calculate enterprise value from equity value, debt, and cash using the EV formula.
prompt: If a company has an equity value of $200 million, debt of $100 million, and cash of $50 million, what is its enterprise value?
solution: Enterprise Value = Equity + Debt - Cash = $200 million + $100 million - $50 million = $250 million.
